```{r Validation rule 37: NEC in first 3 days of life}
if ("dol" %in% colnames(data$necData))
  problems <- problems |>
    dplyr::bind_rows(
      data$events |>
        dplyr::filter(.data$event_type_key == "nec") |>
        dplyr::select("patient_key", "enrollment_key", "event_key") |>
        dplyr::inner_join(
          data$necData |>
            dplyr::select("event_key", "dol"),
          dplyr::join_by("event_key")) |>
        dplyr::filter(.data$dol < 4L) |>
        dplyr::anti_join(
          exceptions |> dplyr::filter(.data$rule_id == 37L),
          dplyr::join_by("event_key")) |>
        tidyr::nest(context = "dol") |>
        dplyr::mutate(
          rule_id        = 37L,
          patient_key    = .data$patient_key,
          enrollment_key = .data$enrollment_key,
          event_key      = .data$event_key,
          context        = .data$context,
          .keep = "none"))
```
